title: × sorbopyrus irregularis
intro: × Sorbopyrus irregularis, also known as the Chinese rowan or irregular rowan, is a hybrid tree species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of × Sorbopyrus irregularis include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, wines, and other medicinal products.
